CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Do NOT repeat the title as a heading since it already appears as the issue's h1. Include context, reproduction steps, or acceptance criteria as appropriate.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Labels to categorize the issue (e.g., 'bug', 'enhancement'). Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Format: 'aw_' followed by 3 to 12 alphanumeric characters (e.g., 'aw_abc1', 'aw_Test123'). Use '#aw_ID' in body text to reference other issues by their temporary_id; these are replaced with actual issue numbers after creation.","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","type":"string"},"title":{"description":"Concise issue title summarizing the bug, feature, or task. The title appears as the main heading, so keep it brief and descriptive.","type":"string"}},"required":["title","body"],"type":"object"},"name":"create_issue"},{"description":"Report that a tool or capability needed to complete the task is not available, or share any information you deem important about missing functionality or limitations. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because the required functionality is missing or access is restricted.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this tool is needed or what information you want to share about the limitation (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"tool":{"description":"Optional: Name or description of the missing tool or capability (max 128 characters). Be specific about what functionality is needed.","type":"string"}},"required":["reason"],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_tool"},{"description":"Log a transparency message when no significant actions are needed. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"message":{"description":"Status or completion message to log. Should explain what was analyzed and the outcome (e.g., 'Code review complete - no issues found', 'Analysis complete - all tests passing').","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":["message"],"type":"object"},"name":"noop"},{"description":"Report that data or information needed to complete the task is not available. Use this when you cannot accomplish what was requested because required data, context, or information is missing.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"alternatives":{"description":"Any workarounds, manual steps, or alternative approaches the user could take (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"context":{"description":"Additional context about the missing data or where it should come from (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"data_type":{"description":"Type or description of the missing data or information (max 128 characters). Be specific about what data is needed.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"Explanation of why this data is needed to complete the task (max 256 characters).","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"}},"required":[],"type":"object"},"name":"missing_data"},{"description":"Signal that the task could not be completed due to an infrastructure or tool failure (e.g., MCP server crash, missing authentication, inaccessible repository). Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"details":{"description":"Optional extended details or diagnostic context about the failure (max 65000 characters).","type":"string"},"reason":{"description":"A concise explanation of why the task could not be completed (max 1024 characters). Be specific about which tools or resources were unavailable.","type":"string"}},"required":["reason"],"type":"object"},"name":"report_incomplete"},{"description":"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{},"type":"object"},"name":"dispatch_triage"}]}}

Five new ARM resource types were introduced:\n\n- `AdvisorAssessmentResource` / `AdvisorAssessmentCollection` (`Microsoft.Advisor/assessments`)\n- `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource` / `AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection` (`Microsoft.Advisor/resiliencyReviews`)\n- `AdvisorScoreEntityResource` / `AdvisorScoreEntityCollection` (advisor score entities per subscription)\n- `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource` / `AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection`\n- `AdvisorTriageResource` / `AdvisorTriageCollection` (`Microsoft.Advisor/triageResources`)\n\n## Gaps Found\n\n- **No sample files for the five new resource types**: `AdvisorAssessmentResource`, `AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource`, `AdvisorScoreEntityResource`, `AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource`, and `AdvisorTriageResource` have no corresponding `Sample_*.cs` test files under `tests/Samples/`, while existing types (Recommendations, SuppressionContracts, MetadataEntities) all have samples\n- **README `Examples` section is a stub**: The section contains only a generic link to `https://aka.ms/azuresdk-net-mgmt-samples` with no inline code snippets demonstrating usage of any resource type — including the newly added ones\n- **README description is outdated**: The opening paragraph says \"This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Advisor Configuration resources\" but the library now covers Recommendations, Suppressions, Metadata Entities, Score Entities, Assessments, Resiliency Reviews, and Triage resources\n\n\u003cdetails\u003e\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\n\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\n\n### Step 1: Modify files\n\n**File:** `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/README.md` — edit\n\nReplace the outdated description sentence. Change:\n\n```\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Advisor Configuration resources.\n```\n\nTo:\n\n```\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Advisor resources including recommendations, suppressions, configurations, assessments, resiliency reviews, advisor scores, and triage resources.\n```\n\nUpdate the `Key concepts` section with a summary of the main resource types:\n\n```markdown\n## Key concepts\n\nKey concepts of the Microsoft Azure SDK for .NET can be found [here](https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk/dotnet_introduction.html).\n\nThe main resource types in this library are:\n\n- **AdvisorRecommendationResource** — Advisor recommendations scoped to a subscription or resource\n- **AdvisorAssessmentResource** — Advisor assessments, accessed via `subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorAssessments()`\n- **AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource** — Resiliency review records, accessed via `subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorResiliencyReviews()`\n- **AdvisorScoreEntityResource** — Advisor score entities per subscription, accessed via `subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorScoreEntities()`\n- **AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource** — Triage recommendations (scoped extension resource)\n- **AdvisorTriageResource** — Triage resource records under a triage recommendation\n- **AdvisorSuppressionContractResource** — Suppressions applied to recommendations\n```\n\nUpdate the `Examples` section to add snippet placeholders (populated by the snippet tool after Step 2):\n\n````markdown\n## Examples\n\nThe following sections provide several code snippets covering common operations.\n\n### List Advisor Assessments\n\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorSample_ListAssessments\n```\n\n### List Advisor Score Entities\n\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorSample_ListScoreEntities\n```\n\n### List Resiliency Reviews\n\n```C# Snippet:AdvisorSample_ListResiliencyReviews\n```\n````\n\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\n\nWrite sample code in test files under `sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/tests/Samples/`.\n\n#### File: `tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorAssessmentCollection.cs` — create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\n#nullable disable\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Samples\n{\n    public partial class Sample_AdvisorAssessmentCollection\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task GetAll_ListAssessments()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:AdvisorSample_ListAssessments\n            // get your azure access token, for more details of how Azure SDK get your access token, please refer to https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/azure/sdk/authentication?tabs=command-line\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            // authenticate your client\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            // this example assumes you already have this SubscriptionResource created on azure\n            string subscriptionId = \"subscriptionId\";\n            ResourceIdentifier subscriptionResourceId = SubscriptionResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId);\n            SubscriptionResource subscriptionResource = client.GetSubscriptionResource(subscriptionResourceId);\n\n            // get the collection of AdvisorAssessmentResource and iterate over it\n            AdvisorAssessmentCollection collection = subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorAssessments();\n            await foreach (AdvisorAssessmentResource assessment in collection.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                AdvisorAssessmentData resourceData = assessment.Data;\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Succeeded on id: {resourceData.Id}\");\n            }\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Succeeded\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n#### File: `tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection.cs` — create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\n#nullable disable\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Samples\n{\n    public partial class Sample_AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task GetAll_ListResiliencyReviews()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:AdvisorSample_ListResiliencyReviews\n            // get your azure access token, for more details of how Azure SDK get your access token, please refer to https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/azure/sdk/authentication?tabs=command-line\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            // authenticate your client\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            // this example assumes you already have this SubscriptionResource created on azure\n            string subscriptionId = \"subscriptionId\";\n            ResourceIdentifier subscriptionResourceId = SubscriptionResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId);\n            SubscriptionResource subscriptionResource = client.GetSubscriptionResource(subscriptionResourceId);\n\n            // get the collection and iterate over resiliency reviews\n            AdvisorResiliencyReviewCollection collection = subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorResiliencyReviews();\n            await foreach (AdvisorResiliencyReviewResource review in collection.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                AdvisorResiliencyReviewData resourceData = review.Data;\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Succeeded on id: {resourceData.Id}\");\n            }\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Succeeded\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n#### File: `tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorScoreEntityCollection.cs` — create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\n\n#nullable disable\n\nusing System;\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\nusing Azure.Identity;\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.Resources;\nusing NUnit.Framework;\n\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Samples\n{\n    public partial class Sample_AdvisorScoreEntityCollection\n    {\n        [Test]\n        [Ignore(\"Only validating compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task GetAll_ListScoreEntities()\n        {\n            #region Snippet:AdvisorSample_ListScoreEntities\n            // get your azure access token, for more details of how Azure SDK get your access token, please refer to https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/azure/sdk/authentication?tabs=command-line\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            // authenticate your client\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            // this example assumes you already have this SubscriptionResource created on azure\n            string subscriptionId = \"subscriptionId\";\n            ResourceIdentifier subscriptionResourceId = SubscriptionResource.CreateResourceIdentifier(subscriptionId);\n            SubscriptionResource subscriptionResource = client.GetSubscriptionResource(subscriptionResourceId);\n\n            // get the collection of AdvisorScoreEntityResource and iterate over it\n            AdvisorScoreEntityCollection collection = subscriptionResource.GetAdvisorScoreEntities();\n            await foreach (AdvisorScoreEntityResource score in collection.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                AdvisorScoreEntityData resourceData = score.Data;\n                Console.WriteLine($\"Succeeded on id: {resourceData.Id}\");\n            }\n            Console.WriteLine(\"Succeeded\");\n            #endregion\n        }\n    }\n}\n```\n\n#### File: `tests/Samples/Sample_AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection.cs` — create\n\n```csharp\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. compilation of examples\")]\n        public async Task GetAll_ListTriageRecommendations()\n        {\n            // get your azure access token, for more details of how Azure SDK get your access token, please refer to https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/azure/sdk/authentication?tabs=command-line\n            TokenCredential cred = new DefaultAzureCredential();\n            // authenticate your client\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(cred);\n\n            // get the collection of AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource for a given scope\n            string scope = \"scope\";\n            AdvisorTriageRecommendationCollection collection = client.GetAdvisorTriageRecommendations(new ResourceIdentifier(scope));\n\n            await foreach (AdvisorTriageRecommendationResource recommendation in collection.GetAllAsync())\n            {\n                AdvisorTriageRecommendationData resourceData = recommendation.Data;\n commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next:\n\n1. `dotnet build sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\n2. `dotnet test sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 advisor` — reads `#region Snippet:` tags from test files and injects code into README placeholder blocks; check the git diff after running to confirm README was updated correctly\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 advisor` — regenerates public API listing files; required since new public types were added\n5. `dotnet format sdk/advisor/Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor/`\n\n\u003c/details\u003e\n\n## Next Steps\n\n\u003e [!TIP]\n\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\n","temporary_id":"aw_adv001","title":"[Advisor] Docs: Add samples and update README for new resource types (Assessments, Resiliency Reviews, Score Entities, Triage)"},"name":"create_issue"}}}

Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. The workflow framework will treat this as a failure signal even when the agent exits successfully."
2026-04-09T22:07:46.3947394Z       },
